title:
Direct growth inhibition assay of total airborne fungi with
application of biocide-treated malt extract agar
author: Er, Sunar, et al.

steps_raw.title:
Preparation of potassium sorbate-incorporated
malt extract agar
steps_raw.instruction:
Firstly, 0.03% (w/v) of potassium sorbate was incorporated
into malt extract agar (MEA). The mixtures were sterilized in an autoclave
at 121 °C for 15 min. Pre-sterilized
Petri dishes measuring 90 mm × 15 mm were filled with 20 mL of the biocide-treated MEA under aseptic conditions. The solidified
biocide-treated MEA plates were sealed with Parafilm. The control MEA plates
without potassium sorbate were prepared under the same conditions. The whole
process was carried out in a laminar flow hood.
